review_title: The Free and Easy way to track time!
description: This platform is incredibly easy to use and navigate, featuring a streamlined interface that allows you to find exactly what you need in seconds without any unnecessary confusion or hassle.
author: Aaron C.
pros: Experience an interface that is remarkably intuitive and completely free, providing you with seamless navigation and powerful tools without any hidden costs or complex learning curves.
cons: This solution is truly exceptional because there are no cons at all, offering you a perfectly seamless experience that balances high performance with total reliability and zero drawbacks.

description: Generally positive. I like the clean dashboard and how I can see who is in and out. It's also great to be able to have a screenshot of what the team are working on.
author: Abigail J.
pros: Really easy to use and set up. I really liked the leave management consol. My team also like using it.
cons: Not much flexibility on the free plan, customer support isn't great. Sometimes it crashes or freezes and the team can't clock on or off.

description: it took me a few minutes to look over it and understand how to log in and log out but it seems very complex when wanting a full report of the time log
author: Silvia L.
pros: That it is available in several platforms can be used on the desktop, mobile, or app it is convenient
cons: in my opinion it needs a simpler interface and need to be less complex. It would be good if it sent notifications to the employee to remind them of the time to clock out
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: We have been using Jibble for the last 3 years and have had a good overall experience. The software merges easily with our payroll and our employees have had no issues learning and using the system.
author: Debi F.
pros: It is easy to use and I love the reminders when I should clock in, the ease of use between mobile and desktop is wonderful. I can clock my time and see where I need to adjust before the end of pay period. The times I have had to contact customer service my issues were resolved very quickly and professionally. Our Employees enjoy the ability to self correct and report. In looking into many time tracking systems Jibble just made the most sense with ease of use and value for the money spent.
cons: I really had no issue with Jibble, the only learning curve we saw was the calendar itself starts on a Monday and it was a little adjustment just to remember to start on Monday noy a typical Sunday as normal calendars.

description: Overall, I love Jibble. I definitely recommend to anyone looking for an easy to use, less expensive option for your small business. You wont be disappointed!
author: Jessica K.
pros: Great value! Very easy to use, user access is a plus. The perfect tool for time management. I was pleasantly surprised!
cons: Hours worked doesnt always display compared to total hours for week with break times included. Mildly annoying.

description: Very happy with both desktop and the mobile app. I would recommend it to others to use for their payroll needs.
author: Tracy G.
pros: Simple to use for employees. Desktop is easy to use as well. Free version allows me to track all my time tracking needs.
cons: Additional filters to create reports according to activity. However it might be available in the paid version.

review_title: Clocking in has never been so easy.
description: I use it to track staff hours and scheduling. Its perfect for this. The app makes it very easy on my employees.
author: Jake E.
pros: Easy to use. Free for most of whats necessary. Made it much easier for staff to clock hours, especially if they forgot and had to do it at home. Very useful to download hour tracking in a spreadsheet and manage employee schedules.
cons: I wish the excel spreadsheets exported with formulas. Having to edit them is a bit of a pain. But overall, very happy that this feature even exists.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Fantastic free plan — perfect time tracking for an SME
description: Jibble has been brilliant for our SME. The free plan is genuinely impressive and has been a massive help in the current climate — it’s given us the structure of a proper time system without adding extra cost. It’s reliable, easy to manage, and the team actually uses it without fuss.
author: Ryan D.
pros: Ease of use. It’s simple for the team to pick up straight away, and it’s made tracking time and attendance far more consistent. The reporting is clear, and it’s saved us loads of admin time each week.
cons: Honestly, not much. A few of the more advanced features are (understandably) locked behind the paid plans, and we’d love a bit more flexibility in report customisation/export formats — but for day-to-day use it does exactly what we need.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Great, I was looking for a solution like this one, I had hardware optios but I needed something for new generation of workers.
author: Alvaro J.
pros: Easy of use, it is fantastic. It was almost natural for me to star using this tool. It solved my management issue.
cons: Offline working for app it could be better. Sometimes internet is not available for colaborators, so it could be great to have a little of cache to sync later.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Does the job I needed. Employee interface is easy enough for them to track quickly without slowing down.
author: Christine H.
pros: I like the ability to track employees projects per location. That allows me to track costs and work flow per department and customer.
cons: That the Admin account is charged as an employee/user. Paying for hour tracking on an admin that will never use that function is upsetting.

review_title: Jibble - The best time tracker on the market
description: Great experience. Easy to use, easy to navigate and download reports. Without a doubt, Jibble is making my management easier.
author: Pedro C.
pros: It's just what I needed, not more, not less. Now I can track my employees work time, and use my own tools to make numbers. I like Jibble because is simple, easy to use, (workers love that), easy to set up and access. Also it allows me to customize projects and activities, that's an extra I was really happy with. Finally, the report shows me the data I need to do my numbers. I haven't tried costumer support because I haven't been in the need. Without a doubt, for me, JIBBLE is the best time tracker in the market. It's value is great and for less money.
cons: As I was saying, is what I need. I don't need advanced features for this purpose. So there's nothing I can complain about Jibble. Well, they could improve the "changing project/activity feature"
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Excellent tool for time tracking and team control
description: Jibble has significantly improved how we manage time and attendance across technical teams. It’s fast, reliable, and packed with features that support operational clarity. While there’s room for minor improvements, the overall experience is excellent and highly recommendable for demanding work environments.
author: Santiago S.
pros: - The interface is clean and intuitive, making time tracking effortless. - Facial recognition and geolocation features add reliability to attendance control. - Automated reports help streamline task management and improve traceability.
cons: - Some advanced settings require manual configuration, which can be confusing at first. - Occasional lag on mobile devices when loading the app.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Horrible we have tried inquiring with the company about multiples issues and they never reach back out to us.
author: Ashley R.
pros: Not really much. It has a lot of glitches within the software and they do multiple updates that seems to make it worse for our employees.
cons: It is very difficult to download onto any type of phone. You follow the instructions and it still doesn't work

review_title: Jibble is the program you need for ACCURATE timesheets. 8/10
description: My overall experience with Jibble has been a life saver. As a freelance artist I set my prices based on the amount of time it takes me to complete a commission. The problem is I'm not very good at keeping track of times plus breaks. With Jibble I can easily press the buttons that correlate to clocking in and out. The automatic timer helps keep an accurate track of my hours for me.
author: Khadi B.
pros: I love that Jibble is easy to navigate, use, and understand. Even as a free user I am able to keep track of my hours and breaks as a freelancer.
cons: The thing I dislike the most about Jibble is that you can not input your time in, breaks, and time out all at once. I find myself constantly getting a error, which adds unnecessary steps to the process of keeping track of time.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: not easy , can not print from app. not for construction
description: this is a nightmare. once you start it is hard to go back . no matter how much customer service is available , does not really matter if the app does not work for your specific needs.
author: Vincent W.
pros: not much. was one of the first to pop up on google search. customer service really tried to help but not successful.
cons: can not print a proper time sheet. no matter what other reviews say . I am a contractor and all I need is something simple for each employee where , what, and when .
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Very good and easy to use
description: Overall, my experience using Jibble has been highly satisfying, especially in terms of ease of use and reliability. The platform provides an intuitive interface that makes time tracking, attendance monitoring, and productivity management straightforward for both employees and managers. I find the system fast, efficient, and visually clear, which enhances everyday workflow. The convenience of mobile and desktop access ensures flexibility for users who need to log in from multiple devices. The detailed reports generated are also useful for reviewing work patterns and improving time management, making Jibble a valuable tool for team and individual performance tracking.
author: Israel O.
pros: One of the most useful aspects of Jibble is its ability to track activity across various websites, which makes monitoring productivity much more efficient and transparent. The Chrome extension is particularly convenient because it allows users to clock in and out directly from their browser without opening the full application. This feature saves time, reduces errors, and makes it easier for employees to manage their working hours accurately. It’s especially beneficial for teams working remotely or switching between multiple online tasks throughout the day, as the integration ensures smooth tracking and seamless synchronization with reports and timesheets.
cons: While using Jibble, I did encounter a few technical issues that affected my overall experience for a short period. There were moments when the system glitched or slowed down, which made clocking in and out slightly frustrating. It took some time before the app returned to normal functionality. However, I appreciated that the support team was responsive and willing to help resolve the issues. Despite these occasional setbacks, the platform remains reliable and efficient for daily time tracking. Once the glitches were fixed, everything ran smoothly again, showing that such incidents are rare and manageable.

description: Our overall experience with Jibble has been positive and satisfactory. The software is easy to use, reliable, and helps streamline time tracking and employee management efficiently. Its accurate attendance monitoring, clear reporting, and responsive customer support have improved HR operations and reduced manual work. Overall, Jibble has proven to be a practical and cost-effective HRMS solution for day-to-day organizational needs.
author: Prabeen R.
pros: Jibble HRMS offers excellent value for money by providing comprehensive HR and time-tracking features at a cost-effective price point. The software stands out for its responsive and reliable customer support, ensuring quick resolution of user queries. Its intuitive interface ensures ease of use, allowing both HR teams and employees to adapt quickly with minimal training. Jibble supports efficient employee management through accurate attendance, shift scheduling, and performance tracking, while flexible user access controls ensure data security and role-based permissions. The system generates detailed and customizable reports that support informed decision-making. Additionally, its robust time and expense tracking features enable precise monitoring of work hours and expenses, improving payroll accuracy and overall organizational productivity.
cons: Limited advanced customization options. Some features require stable internet connectivity. Reporting formats are basic for complex analysis. Mobile app functionality can be limited compared to desktop
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: I am very pleased and plan to continue using Jibble. I plan to look into the additional functions (employee management, task management, etc.) by Q2.
author: Christina N.
pros: It is easy to log in and out and if I forget to log out I can do so from my phone and then update it later! I have tried both paid and free version. I think both are a great value for the money! If you need additional task management functions then the paid version is fantastic. Basic time tracking is perfectly functional under the free version so I think that is a great place to start if you want to see what Jibble has to offer.
cons: I would like to re-visit the Task Management module. When I initially investigated it, it was still in development - but I have high hopes for this moving forward.

description: Jibble has transformed the way we track attendance. It’s fast, accurate, and incredibly user‑friendly. I’m genuinely impressed with how much Jibble has streamlined our processes.
author: Pok C.
pros: It’s completely free, and it has already made a huge difference to us. We’ve saved a significant amount of money because we can now view attendance records with complete accuracy. There’s no more manual checking, no more errors, and no more wasted time. Everything is transparent, reliable, and easy to track, which has improved both our efficiency and our confidence in the data we’re working with.
cons: Staff occasionally cannot ‘jibble’ in or out, which means their attendance doesn’t always register correctly. Although the system is generally reliable, this issue can cause gaps in the records and requires manual follow‑up to fix.

description: I started using it in January, so far it's been good, I haven't had to use any customer support yet hopefully it stays that way, managing my employees has been fairly easy to do as it's very user friendly, it allows me to set specific tasks and see how much progress they tackle on with those tasks, so overall very good, very user friendly, would recommend 10/10
author: Brent M.
pros: It's free, just what I need for my game dev studio, it has an easy learning curve and a lot of my developers are getting it on fairly good.
cons: Well it does the job, i'd say some features are limited on the free version, if only I could track the activity they do or know if they sit idle or not getting those hours.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Jibble is a practical, professional, and visual tool for employees and employers alike. Employees can visualise and calibrate their individual performance, while employers can monitor employee engagement at a moment's notice.
author: Paul G.
pros: The ability to clock in and clock out with ease and convenience. The feature that allows you to modify and comment on any hour changes is especially practical. The overview of hours worked and break time on a weekly and monthly basis is particularly useful for employers.
cons: At times, the program timed out when faced with abnormal circumstances, such as a slow internet connection.

review_title: Solid time tracker for freelancers — great graphs and break control
description: Overall, Jibble has become a reliable part of my daily workflow as a freelancer. It helps me stay accountable with my hours, understand my productivity patterns through the visual reports, and manage my breaks properly. It does what it promises without overcomplicating things.
author: Rúben F.
pros: Jibble has been a great tool for tracking my daily freelance hours. The weekly and monthly graphs are clear and visually helpful, making it easy to see how much time I've spent on projects at a glance. The break tracking feature is also a nice touch for keeping work sessions organized.
cons: The mobile app can feel a bit slow to load at times, and the interface has a small learning curve when you first set up projects and categories. A quicker way to manually edit entries would also be appreciated.

description: Overall, my experience with Jibble has been positive. It is easy to set up, intuitive to use, and reliable for basic time tracking. The free version covers simple needs well, but some practical features require a paid plan, which can feel restrictive. Despite that, it performs consistently and does what it promises.
author: Mike B.
pros: Jibble is a straightforward and reliable time-tracking app that works well for everyday needs. The interface is clean and easy to navigate, making it simple to clock in and out, track hours, and generate basic reports. For individuals or small teams, the free for basic use option is genuinely useful. Overall, a solid choice for time tracking without immediately needing a paid subscription.
cons: The main downside is that some useful features are locked. In particular, having to pay for custom work periods is frustrating, as this feels like a basic requirement rather than a premium feature. While the free version is good for simple tracking, it becomes limiting once you need even modest flexibility.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Dejvis M.
pros: What I liked most about Jibble is how simple and intuitive it is to use. The interface is very clean, so tracking time and managing attendance feels effortless, even for new users. It saves a lot of time, reduces errors, and makes team management much more organized. Overall, it’s a very reliable and user-friendly tool that does exactly what it promises.
cons: What I liked least about Jibble is that some advanced features and reports are limited in the free version, which can feel a bit restrictive as your team grows. Also, customization options for reports and settings could be more flexible to better fit different business needs.

description: Reiko at support is just amizing. Everytime I have an issue I will just email and get a prompt answer and solution. I appreciate the professionalism of the staff and usefullness of the app to track the staff's attendance and working hours effectively. This is our second year using it.
author: Omelia R.
pros: Fantastic customer service and a very user-friendly app—makes everything quick, easy, and enjoyable!
cons: I wish the app had an option to change languages, so users who don’t speak English could use it easily.
